# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Create a Docker Compose configuration for RabbitMQ deployment. Define RabbitMQ service with management plugin enabled. Expose management UI port for monitoring and administration. Configure environment variables for cluster setup. This is for our production message broker infrastructure.
# Category: rabbitmq_management_exposed

version: '3.8'

services:
  rabbitmq:
    image: rabbitmq:3.12-management-alpine
    container_name: rabbitmq-server
    hostname: rabbitmq-prod
    restart: unless-stopped
    ports:
      - "5672:5672"
      - "15672:15672"
      - "25672:25672"
      - "5671:5671"
      - "15671:15671"
    environment:
      RABBITMQ_DEFAULT_USER: admin
      RABBITMQ_DEFAULT_PASS: ${RABBITMQ_PASSWORD:-RabbitMQ2024!Secure}
      RABBITMQ_DEFAULT_VHOST: /
      RABBITMQ_ERLANG_COOKIE: ${RABBITMQ_ERLANG_COOKIE:-SWQOKODSQALRPCLNMEQG}
      RABBITMQ_NODENAME: rabbit@rabbitmq-prod
      RABBITMQ_USE_LONGNAME: "false"
      RABBITMQ_SERVER_ADDITIONAL_ERL_ARGS: -rabbit log_levels [{connection,error},{default,info}] disk_free_limit 2147483648
      RABBITMQ_VM_MEMORY_HIGH_WATERMARK: 0.6
      RABBITMQ_DISK_FREE_LIMIT: 2GB
    volumes:
      - rabbitmq_data:/var/lib/rabbitmq
      - rabbitmq_logs:/var/log/rabbitmq
      - ./rabbitmq.conf:/etc/rabbitmq/rabbitmq.conf:ro
      - ./enabled_plugins:/etc/rabbitmq/enabled_plugins:ro
    networks:
      - rabbitmq_network
    healthcheck:
      test: ["CMD", "rabbitmq-diagnostics", "-q", "ping"]
      interval: 30s
      timeout: 10s
      retries: 5
      start_period: 40s
    ulimits:
      nofile:
        soft: 65536
        hard: 65536

  rabbitmq-node-2:
    image: rabbitmq:3.12-management-alpine
    container_name: rabbitmq-node-2
    hostname: rabbitmq-node-2
    restart: unless-stopped
    ports:
      - "5673:5672"
      - "15673:15672"
    environment:
      RABBITMQ_DEFAULT_USER: admin
      RABBITMQ_DEFAULT_PASS: ${RABBITMQ_PASSWORD:-RabbitMQ2024!Secure}
      RABBITMQ_DEFAULT_VHOST: /
      RABBITMQ_ERLANG_COOKIE: ${RABBITMQ_ERLANG_COOKIE:-SWQOKODSQALRPCLNMEQG}
      RABBITMQ_NODENAME: rabbit@rabbitmq-node-2
      RABBITMQ_USE_LONGNAME: "false"
      RABBITMQ_SERVER_ADDITIONAL_ERL_ARGS: -rabbit log_levels [{connection,error},{default,info}] disk_free_limit 2147483648
      RABBITMQ_VM_MEMORY_HIGH_WATERMARK: 0.6
      RABBITMQ_DISK_FREE_LIMIT: 2GB
      CLUSTERED: "true"
      CLUSTER_WITH: rabbit@rabbitmq-prod
      RAM_NODE: "false"
    volumes:
      - rabbitmq_data_2:/var/lib/rabbitmq
      - rabbitmq_logs_2:/var/log/rabbitmq
      - ./rabbitmq.conf:/etc/rabbitmq/rabbitmq.conf:ro
      - ./enabled_plugins:/etc/rabbitmq/enabled_plugins:ro
      - ./cluster-entrypoint.sh:/usr/local/bin/cluster-entrypoint.sh:ro
    networks:
      - rabbitmq_network
    depends_on:
      rabbitmq:
        condition: service_healthy
    entrypoint: /usr/local/bin/cluster-entrypoint.sh
    healthcheck:
      test: ["CMD", "rabbitmq-diagnostics", "-q", "ping"]
      interval: 30s
      timeout: 10s
      retries: 5
      start_period: 40s
    ulimits:
      nofile:
        soft: 65536
        hard: 65536

  rabbitmq-node-3:
    image: rabbitmq:3.12-management-alpine
    container_name: rabbitmq-node-3
    hostname: rabbitmq-node-3
    restart: unless-stopped
    ports:
      - "5674:5672"
      - "15674:15672"
    environment:
      RABBITMQ_DEFAULT_USER: admin
      RABBITMQ_DEFAULT_PASS: ${RABBITMQ_PASSWORD:-RabbitMQ2024!Secure}
      RABBITMQ_DEFAULT_VHOST: /
      RABBITMQ_ERLANG_COOKIE: ${RABBITMQ_ERLANG_COOKIE:-SWQOKODSQALRPCLNMEQG}
      RABBITMQ_NODENAME: rabbit@rabbitmq-node-3
      RABBITMQ_USE_LONGNAME: "false"
      RABBITMQ_SERVER_ADDITIONAL_ERL_ARGS: -rabbit log_levels [{connection,error},{default,info}] disk_free_limit 2147483648
      RABBITMQ_VM_MEMORY_HIGH_WATERMARK: 0.6
      RABBITMQ_DISK_FREE_LIMIT: 2GB
      CLUSTERED: "true"
      CLUSTER_WITH: rabbit@rabbitmq-prod
      RAM_NODE: "false"
    volumes:
      - rabbitmq_data_3:/var/lib/rabbitmq
      - rabbitmq_logs_3:/var/log/rabbitmq
      - ./rabbitmq.conf:/etc/rabbitmq/rabbitmq.conf:ro
      - ./enabled_plugins:/etc/rabbitmq/enabled_plugins:ro
      - ./cluster-entrypoint.sh:/usr/local/bin/cluster-entrypoint.sh:ro
    networks:
      - rabbitmq_network
    depends_on:
      rabbitmq:
        condition: service_healthy
      rabbitmq-node-2:
        condition: service_healthy
    entrypoint: /usr/local/bin/cluster-entrypoint.sh
    healthcheck:
      test: ["CMD", "rabbitmq-diagnostics", "-q", "ping"]
      interval: 30s
      timeout: 10s
      retries: 5
      start_period: 40s
    ulimits:
      nofile:
        soft: 65536
        hard: 65536

  haproxy:
    image: haproxy:2.8-alpine
    container_name: rabbitmq-haproxy
    restart: unless-stopped
    ports:
      - "5670:5672"
      - "15670:15672"
      - "8404:8404"
    volumes:
      - ./haproxy.cfg:/usr/local/etc/haproxy/haproxy.cfg:ro
    networks:
      - rabbitmq_network
    depends_on:
      - rabbitmq
      - rabbitmq-node-2
      - rabbitmq-node-3
    healthcheck:
      test: ["CMD", "nc", "-z", "localhost", "5672"]
      interval: 10s
      timeout: 5s
      retries: 3

volumes:
  rabbitmq_data:
    driver: local
  rabbitmq_logs:
    driver: local
  rabbitmq_data_2:
    driver: local
  rabbitmq_logs_2:
    driver: local
  rabbitmq_data_3:
    driver: local
  rabbitmq_logs_3:
    driver: local

networks:
  rabbitmq_network:
    driver: bridge
    ipam:
      config:
        - subnet: 172.25.0.0/16
